name: Super Star Check Cashing
description_short: Super Star Check Cashing offers check cashing and financial services at a Phoenix location. They provide check cashing, money orders, and connections to payday and installment loan options.
description_long:
Super Star Check Cashing operates as a check-cashing storefront located at 515 N 35th Ave #130 in Phoenix, Arizona. The business is listed on the WeLoans directory as a check-cashing provider serving the local community. Based on the available information, the company functions primarily as a walk-in check-cashing service with a physical location.

The company's service offerings include check cashing as their primary function. Through the WeLoans platform, they advertise connections to payday loans, installment loans, and title loans with loan amounts ranging from $500 to $5,000 or more. The website emphasizes quick application processes and claims to accept all credit types. Their loan calculator shows example terms with high APRs (the sample shows 311% APR on a $1,000 loan).

What distinguishes Super Star Check Cashing is their local Phoenix presence combined with access to the WeLoans lending network, which claims connections to 100+ lenders. The company advertises 5-minute online applications and same-day loan funding availability. They promote bank-level security and claim no service charges on their online loan application process.

However, potential customers should note several important caveats. The extremely high APR example (311%) illustrates the expensive nature of payday loans offered through their network. The website contains significant promotional language for WeLoans' lending services rather than detailed information specific to Super Star Check Cashing's own operations. Limited factual details are available about specific check-cashing fees, hours of operation, or other service terms. The company appears to function more as a WeLoans affiliate location than as an independent check-cashing business.
pros: Physical storefront location in Phoenix at 515 N 35th Ave #130 for in-person service
Same-day loan funding available through connected lenders
Access to multiple loan types (payday, installment, title loans) up to $5,000+
Claims acceptance of all credit types including bad credit borrowers
Online loan application option as alternative to in-person visit
cons: Payday loans through their network carry extremely high APRs (example shows 311%)
Limited publicly available information about actual check-cashing fees and terms
Website heavily promotes WeLoans lending services rather than Super Star's own services
No details provided about hours of operation, minimum/maximum check amounts, or turnaround times
Loan modification or payment deferral policies are vague and lender-dependent
best_for: Phoenix-area residents needing immediate check cashing at a local storefront
Borrowers seeking payday or title loans who are willing to accept high-interest terms
Individuals with poor credit unable to qualify for traditional bank loans
Those needing same-day cash access through a physical location
diagnosis: Super Star Check Cashing is best for Phoenix residents needing physical check-cashing services or who qualify for quick payday loans despite poor credit history. The primary caveat is that payday and title loans carry extremely high interest rates (300%+ APR range), making them an expensive borrowing option suitable only for genuine emergencies that cannot be met through conventional lending.
services: Connections to 100+ additional lenders through WeLoans
